parts.text: Can you fetch from the internet?

I don't have the ability to directly fetch information from the internet or browse web pages. I don't have a web browser tool or internet access capabilities.

I can help you with software development tasks like:
- Reading and writing local files
- Executing commands on your system
- Helping with coding and debugging
- Creating documentation
- Analyzing code

If you need information from the internet, you would need to provide that information to me, or I could help you write a script that uses appropriate libraries to fetch data if you're working on such a project.

What specific software development task can I help you with today?
